title: An Act to exempt municipal solar facilities from regional limits on net metering

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Barrett, a petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Michael J. Barrett for legislation to exempt municipal solar facilities from regional limits on net metering.  Telecommunications, Utilities and Energy.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Telecommunications, Utilities and Energy
